Key index in PED: range is [1,99].
MACKeyType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The type of the key which is used to calculate MAC value.
MACWorkMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
MAC calculation mode:

MaestroAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

Flag indicates whether magnetic card swipe is allowed.

The cardholder’s maintenance ID.

MainTenanceId - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
The cardholder’s maintenance ID.
ManageRequest - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
The ManageRequest object which need to be created before assign to this property.
ManageRequest - Class in com.pax.poslink
To set manage transaction request properties.
For each command, it has its own supported parameters.

Valid when EDC type is Credit or Debit.
MaskedPAN - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
The Masked PAN of the card.

Number of key slots remaining available for Master Key

MAXAccountLength - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
MAX length for account.
MAXLength - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
MAX length of input text.
MaxNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
SAF max number of record - SAF only support this number of records.
MaxNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
SAF max number of record - SAF only support this number of records.
MerchantCategory - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Digit merchant code referring to the category of the merchant as defined by the networks.
MerchantCategoryCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
A Merchant Category Code (MCC) is a four-digit number listed in ISO 18245 for retail financial services.
MerchantDecision - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Merchant decision to the current transaction.
MerchantID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
Max 5 merchant ID’s connect by '#'.
MerchantKey - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Deprecated. 
MerchantName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Merchant name
MerchantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The merchant tax id.
MerChantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.
MerChantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.
MerchantTotals - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Totals for each MID and TID combination.
MerchantTotals - Class in com.pax.poslink
Totals for each MID and TID combination.

Message - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Host returned error message.
Message - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Host returned error message.

the first line of message displayed on screen.
Message2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
the second line of message displayed on screen.
